summary: EXP-267 (this run) adds a new fourth-horn paragraph to the §4.2.2 closing trilemma that engages the post-Sq-residual defense: dome owes a published, pre-registered Sq-subtraction methodology; without one, 'the rule means residual' is a moveable goalpost. Closes by reaffirming that the BOU-2017 trilemma still fires on the only reading the dome has actually anchored (raw measurement vs 0 nT). Hoisted the §4.2.7 forward-link to its own paragraph (c2 minor polish 4(a)) for closing-beat clarity. Decider can close ISS-1603 once EXP-267 integrates.
